data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for linkage to authorization and/or BAA.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the linkage to authorization and/or BAA when relevant. However, the provided evidence does not include any records or checks that confirm this linkage exists or functions as required. The linked use case mentions the need for such linkage but does not provide concrete evidence of its implementation or verification.
gaps: No evidence of linkage to authorization and/or BAA.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
